scripts.dev: echo 'API runs in Docker — start with: docker-compose up -d'
scripts.build: docker exec fastify_api nubx tsc && docker exec fastify_api nubx tsc-alias && docker cp fastify_api:/app/apps/api/dist ./dist
scripts.db:generate: docker exec fastify_drizzle_studio nubx drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: docker exec fastify_drizzle_studio nubx drizzle-kit migrate && docker exec -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:password@postgres:5432/fastify_test fastify_drizzle_studio nubx drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:studio: docker exec fastify_drizzle_studio nubx drizzle-kit studio --port 4983 --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.lint: docker exec fastify_api nubx eslint src
scripts.lint:fix: docker exec fastify_api nubx eslint src --fix
scripts.test:unit: docker exec -e NODE_ENV=test fastify_api nubx vitest run
